name: mythosforge-skill-scaffold
description: Generate a new MythosForge skill folder on the locked universal template. No key required — writes files locally.
invoke: node scaffold.mjs --name <kebab-name> --description "<one line>" [--tool-name x] [--env VAR] [--env-link url] [--model-slug owner/model] [--ext webp] [--out dir] [--force] [--dry-run]
output: JSON line on stdout: { ok, name, dir, files }. Read `dir` for the generated skill.

runtimes.tool-use-llm: hand tool-schema.json (openai or anthropic block) to the model; host runs invoke on the tool call.
